import pytest
from unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock
from myapp.service import OrderProcessor

@pytest.fixture
def mock_dependencies():
    with patch("myapp.service.charge_payment") as mock_pay, \
         patch("myapp.service.reserve_inventory") as mock_inv, \
         patch("myapp.service.lookup_customer") as mock_cust:
        mock_pay.return_value = {"txn_id": "TXN-1", "status": "ok"}
        mock_inv.return_value = True
        mock_cust.return_value = {"id": "C1", "name": "Alice"}
        yield {
            "payment": mock_pay,
            "inventory": mock_inv,
            "customer": mock_cust,
        }

def test_process_order_succeeds(mock_dependencies):
    processor = OrderProcessor()
    result = processor.process({"item": "widget", "qty": 1})
    assert result["status"] == "completed"
    mock_dependencies["payment"].assert_called_once()

def test_process_order_payment_failure(mock_dependencies):
    mock_dependencies["payment"].side_effect = Exception("declined")
    processor = OrderProcessor()
    result = processor.process({"item": "widget", "qty": 1})
    assert result["status"] == "payment_failed"
